subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Akbar! In this moment thy name is present before the Wronged One, and thou art blessed with the glance of loving-kindness. We beseech God that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی اکبر در این حین اسمت نزد مظلوم حاضر و بلحاظ عنایت فائز نسئل الله ان
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @personal instructions
